inputs.label: Energy Consumption per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Total energy consumed per production unit

inputs.label: Water Consumption per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Total water usage per production unit

inputs.label: Waste Generation per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Total waste produced per production unit

inputs.label: Renewable Energy Share
inputs.businessContext: Share of energy from renewable sources

inputs.label: Recycled Material Content
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of recycled materials used in production

formulas.sustainabilityScore: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, ((1 - energyPerUnit / 50) * 100 + (1 - waterPerUnit / 100) * 100 + (1 - wastePerUnit / 5) * 100 + renewablePct + recycledPct) / 5))
